Headline: #126 Jackson and #147 Outer Drive Express Temporary Reroute near Michigan/Ida B. Wells
ShortDescription: 126 Jackson and 147 Outer Drive Express buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Michigan/Ida B. Wells

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#126 Jackson and #147 Outer Drive Express buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Michigan/Ida B. Wells.

#126 Jackson buses will reroute in both directions via Michigan, Harrison, Wabash, Balbo, Michigan and over normal route.

#147 Outer Drive Express buses will operate via:
Southbound: Michigan, Harrison, Wabash and over normal route.

Northbound: Harrison, State, Ida B. Wells, and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
